case_title: PATRICK OWENS VS. BILL HING ET AL

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWENS, PATRICK

REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL SUBMITTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-17-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HING-MA FAMILY TRUST
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF PARTRICK OWNES IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS BILL HING AND HING-MA FAMILY TRUST ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,150.00 FILED BY OWENS, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT HING, BILL HING-MA FAMILY TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [BILL HING] FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWENS, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT HING-MA FAMILY TRUST

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-22-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PATRICK OWNS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT BILL HING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HING-MA FAMILY TRUST IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ERIC HING. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. DISCLOSURE OF CAMPAIGN ENDORSED BY THE DEFENDANT BILL HING WAS MADE. PLAINTIFF AGREED TO PROCEED WITH HEARING. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $830.00 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK AND MAILED OUT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEPTEMBER 22, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. ORAL DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS BY THE PLAINTIFF. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
